title: acer obtusatum var. neapolitanum
intro: Acer obtusatum var. neapolitanum, also known as the Maple, is a deciduous shrub or small tree belonging to the Sapindaceae family. The plant is rich in medicinal properties, primarily due to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic acids, which exhibit antioxidant and anti-inflammatory activities. The health benefits of Acer obtusatum var. neapolitanum include its ability to reduce inflammation and improve cardiovascular health, as well as its potential to act as an antiseptic and antibacterial agent. Acer obtusatum var. neapolitanum can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, and its extracts have been used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
